de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class TreeSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.TreeSettings
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITreeSettings

    public class TreeSettings
extends Object
implements ITreeSettings
    The default implementation of ITreeSettings.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean mergeBranchConditions
      true merge branch conditions which means that a branch condition never contains another branch condition or false allow that branch conditions contains branch conditions.
      private boolean simplifyConditions
      true simplify conditions, false do not simplify conditions.
      private boolean usePrettyPrinting
      true use pretty printing, false do not use pretty printing.
      private boolean useUnicode
      true use unicode characters, false do not use unicode characters.
      private boolean variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates
      true IExecutionVariable are only computed from updates, false IExecutionVariables are computed according to the type structure of the visible memory.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TreeSettings(boolean mergeBranchConditions, boolean useUnicode, boolean usePrettyPrinting, boolean variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates, boolean simplifyConditions)
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean isMergeBranchConditions()
      Checks if multiple branch conditions are merged or not.
      boolean isSimplifyConditions()
      Checks if conditions should be simplified or not.
      boolean isUsePrettyPrinting()
      Checks if pretty printing is used or not.
      boolean isUseUnicode()
      Checks if unicode characters are used.
      boolean isVariablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates()
      Checks how variables are computed.

    • Field Detail

      • mergeBranchConditions

        private final boolean mergeBranchConditions
        true merge branch conditions which means that a branch condition never contains another branch condition or false allow that branch conditions contains branch conditions.

      • useUnicode

        private final boolean useUnicode
        true use unicode characters, false do not use unicode characters.

      • usePrettyPrinting

        private final boolean usePrettyPrinting
        true use pretty printing, false do not use pretty printing.

      • variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates

        private final boolean variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates
        true IExecutionVariable are only computed from updates, false IExecutionVariables are computed according to the type structure of the visible memory.

      • simplifyConditions

        private final boolean simplifyConditions
        true simplify conditions, false do not simplify conditions.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TreeSettings

        public TreeSettings(boolean mergeBranchConditions,
                    boolean useUnicode,
                    boolean usePrettyPrinting,
                    boolean variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates,
                    boolean simplifyConditions)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        mergeBranchConditions - true merge branch conditions which means that a branch condition never contains another branch condition or false allow that branch conditions contains branch conditions.
        useUnicode - true use unicode characters, false do not use unicode characters.
        usePrettyPrinting - true use pretty printing, false do not use pretty printing.
        variablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates - true IExecutionVariable are only computed from updates, false IExecutionVariables are computed according to the type structure of the visible memory.
        simplifyConditions - true simplify conditions, false do not simplify conditions.

        Checks if multiple branch conditions are merged or not.

      • isVariablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates

        public boolean isVariablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates()
        Checks how variables are computed.
        Specified by:
        isVariablesAreOnlyComputedFromUpdates in interface ITreeSettings
        Returns:
        true IExecutionVariable are only computed from updates, false IExecutionVariables are computed according to the type structure of the visible memory.

        public boolean isSimplifyConditions()
        Checks if conditions should be simplified or not.
        Specified by:
        isSimplifyConditions in interface ITreeSettings

        true simplify conditions, false do not simplify conditions.
